title: Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for September 2, 2021 web conference - Canada.ca
content:
## Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for September 2, 2021 web conference
This web conference will focus on a discussion of the state of the  evidence on efficacy for health products containing cannabidiol ( CBD ). In  advance of the meeting, members were asked to provide written comments to key  efficacy-related questions, which will structure and guide the discussions. Although  the discussion will focus on CBD , cannabis and other phytocannabinoids may also  be discussed. The meeting will conclude with a presentation from the Australian  Therapeutic Goods Administration on their recent work involving CBD .

Agenda – September 2, 2021 3:00 pm to 6:00 pm ET
